message:
test(database): add T6.3 hardening tests for MySQL URL parsing and query params

Add comprehensive test coverage for the MySQL client's new hardening
features:

- percent_decode: basic decoding, passthrough of malformed sequences,
  mixed-case hex
- Connection URL parsing: percent-encoded password and user, ssl-mode
  from query params (required, preferred), connect_timeout parsing,
  invalid ssl-mode rejection, multiple combined params, unknown params
  silently ignored
- Packet safety: oversized payload assertion with clear panic message
- Result set limits: verify default 1M row cap, custom limit setter,
  unlimited (usize::MAX) mode
- Abandoned transaction drain: verify needs_rollback flag and implicit
  ROLLBACK before next command

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
